title: delegation.created / delegation.activated / delegation.revoked / delegation.expired event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.11. Produced by epd2_delegation_service.events.delegation_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_delegation_created_event (delegation.created), build_delegation_activated_event (delegation.activated), build_delegation_revoked_event (delegation.revoked), and build_delegation_expired_event (delegation.expired) - verified by reading events.py, all four call the shared private _build_delegation_event helper with the identical payload function and differ only in event_type. additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control: account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema - only opaque delegator_actor_id/delegate_actor_id references are ever carried. valid_until is nullable.
